_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: Immunohistochemical-staining of Ki67 revealed no significant difference in Ki67 positive cells between the treatment groups, likely due to the low proliferative index of these benign tumors at baseline
details: Immunohistochemical staining revealed no significant difference in Ki67 positive cells between treatment groups, likely due to low proliferative index of benign tumors at baseline
